title: Women’s Ethical & Empowering Safari
description: A women-only safari experience combining wildlife, culture and personal growth. Travel through Kenya’s iconic destinations while engaging with local communities, conservation projects and meaningful cultural experiences, all within a safe and supportive group environment.
highlights: Game drives in Samburu and Maasai Mara
Visit Giraffe Centre and Elephant Orphanage
Hosted group experience with expert guide

itinerary.title: Arrival in Nairobi
itinerary.description: Arrival at Jomo Kenyatta International Airport and transfer to your hotel. Evening at leisure.

itinerary.title: Nairobi Immersion
itinerary.description: Explore Nairobi or relax before the safari. Evening welcome meeting with fellow travelers.

itinerary.title: Ol Pejeta Conservancy
itinerary.description: Drive north through the highlands to Ol Pejeta. Afternoon game drive and rhino conservation experience.

itinerary.title: Transfer to Samburu
itinerary.description: Drive to Samburu National Reserve and enjoy wildlife viewing in this unique arid ecosystem.

itinerary.title: Samburu Community Experience
itinerary.description: Bush walk with rangers, visit local school and enjoy traditional community experiences.

itinerary.title: Reteti Elephant Sanctuary
itinerary.description: Visit the community-owned Reteti Elephant Sanctuary and learn about elephant conservation.

itinerary.title: Return to Nairobi
itinerary.description: Travel back to Nairobi for overnight stay and relaxation.

itinerary.title: Fly to Maasai Mara
itinerary.description: Flight to Maasai Mara followed by an afternoon game drive.

itinerary.title: Maasai Mara Safari
itinerary.description: Full day game drives in Maasai Mara exploring wildlife and landscapes.

itinerary.title: Community Visit
itinerary.description: Visit local community projects and enjoy a reflective group experience.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Morning flight back to Nairobi and transfer for departure.

included: Domestic flight Maasai Mara to Nairobi
accommodation: Sweetwaters Tented Camp – Ol Pejeta (1 night)
Soroi Mara Bush Camp – Maasai Mara (3 nights)

travelInfo.clothes: Comfortable safari wear, modest clothing for community visits, hat, sunscreen and a light jacket for cool mornings.
travelInfo.food: Mix of international and local cuisine served at lodges with full board meal plans during safari.

note: This is a women-only group safari. Pricing is fixed and based on scheduled departures.
